2603.17311.title: Ruyi2.5 Technical Report
2603.17311.paper_summary: We present Ruyi2.5, a multimodal familial model built on the AI Flow framework. Extending Ruyi2's "Train Once, Deploy Many" paradigm to the multimodal domain, Ruyi2.5 constructs a shared-backbone architecture that co-trains models of varying scales within a single unified pipeline, ensuring semantic consistency across all deployment tiers. Built upon Ruyi2.5, Ruyi2.5-Camera model is developed as a privacy-preserving camera service system, which instantiates Ruyi2.5-Camera into a two-stage recognition pipeline: an edge model applies information-bottleneck-guided irreversible feature mapping to de-identify raw frames at the source, while a cloud model performs deep behavior reasoning. To accelerate reinforcement learning fine-tuning, we further propose Binary Prefix Policy Optimization (BPPO), which reduces sample redundancy via binary response selection and focuses gradient updates on response prefixes, achieving a 2 to 3 times training speedup over GRPO. Experiments show Ruyi2.5 matches Qwen3-VL on the general multimodal benchmarks, while Ruyi2.5-Camera substantially outperforms Qwen3-VL on privacy-constrained surveillance tasks.
2603.17311.paper_summary_zh: 我們介紹 Ruyi2.5，一個基於 AI Flow 框架的多模態家庭模型。將 Ruyi2 的「一次訓練，多次部署」範式擴展到多模態領域，Ruyi2.5 構建了一個共享骨幹架構，該架構在單一統一的管道中共同訓練不同規模的模型，確保所有部署層之間的語義一致性。在 Ruyi2.5 的基礎上，Ruyi2.5-Camera 模型被開發為一個保護隱私的攝像頭服務系統，將 Ruyi2.5-Camera 實現為一個兩階段的識別管道：邊緣模型應用信息瓶頸引導的不可逆特徵映射來在源頭去識別原始幀，而雲模型則執行深度行為推理。為了加速強化學習微調，我們進一步提出了二進制前綴策略優化（BPPO），通過二進制響應選擇減少樣本冗餘，並將梯度更新集中在響應前綴上，實現了比 GRPO 快 2 到 3 倍的訓練速度。實驗顯示 Ruyi2.5 在一般多模態基準上與 Qwen3-VL 相匹配，而 Ruyi2.5-Camera 在隱私受限的監控任務上則顯著超越 Qwen3-VL。
2603.17311.author: Huan Song et.al.
2603.17311.authors: Huan Song, Shuyu Tian, Qingfei Zhao, Wenhao Hong, Jiang Liu, Ting Long, Jiawei Shao, Xuelong Li
